---
title: "Vahhab Piranfar"
subtitle: "Microbiologist • Bioinformatician • Research Scientist"
include-in-header: gtm-head.html
include-before-body: gtm-body.html
---

::: {.hero-panel}
::: {.grid .align-items-center}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](profile.jpg){.hero-photo fig-alt="Portrait of Vahhab Piranfar"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
## Researching pathogens, data, and disease mechanisms

I work at the intersection of **clinical microbiology**, **bioinformatics**, and **data-driven discovery**. My research focuses on antimicrobial resistance, molecular diagnostics, and computational approaches to understanding pathogen behavior.

<div class="hero-badges">
<span class="hero-pill">🧬 Microbiology</span>
<span class="hero-pill">💻 Bioinformatics</span>
<span class="hero-pill">📊 Data Science</span>
</div>

[Explore my projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-light}  
[Read my publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
### <span class="feature-icon"><i class="bi bi-bug"></i></span> Microbiology
Clinical diagnostics, pathogen identification, and antimicrobial resistance research across hospital and translational settings.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
### <span class="feature-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></span> Bioinformatics
Computational modeling, molecular dynamics, and data analysis for understanding resistance, persistence, and host-pathogen interactions.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
### <span class="feature-icon"><i class="bi bi-globe2"></i></span> Research Communication
Writing, public science communication, and collaborative work focused on making complex findings accessible and actionable.
:::
:::
:::

## Current focus

Welcome to my personal research hub. I am a **Molecular Microbiologist** recognized as an **EB-1A recipient** for my work in clinical diagnostics and pathogen research.

Based in **Jersey City, NJ**, I combine laboratory insight with computational analysis to study bacterial pathogens, resistance patterns, and molecular interactions.

::: {.info-card}
### Vision Statement
> “In the modern era of microbiology, the microscope is no longer our only lens. By integrating computational data analysis with molecular techniques, we can decode pathogen behavior at a scale that was previously unimaginable.”
>
> — **Vahhab Piranfar**
:::
